# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: high-performance-service
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: high-performance-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: high-performance-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: high-performance-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: high-performance-service
        image: high-performance-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "1000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: high-performance-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: high-performance-service
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-database
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: low-latency-database
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-database
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-database
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: database
        image: redis:7-alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-database
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: low-latency-database
  ports:
  - port: 6379
    targetPort: 6379
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-network-service
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: direct-network-service
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-network-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-network-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: direct-network-service
        image: direct-network-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9090
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: NETWORK_MODE
          value: "direct"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: direct-network-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: direct-network-service
  ports:
  - port: 9090
    targetPort: 9090
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: udp-streaming-service
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: udp-streaming-service
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: udp-streaming-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: udp-streaming-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: streaming
        image: udp-streaming-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5000
          protocol: UDP
        - containerPort: 8000
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "400m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: udp-streaming-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: udp-streaming-service
  ports:
  - name: udp-stream
    port: 5000
    targetPort: 5000
    protocol: UDP
  - name: http-control
    port: 8000
    targetPort: 8000
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: legacy-network-app
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: legacy-network-app
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: legacy-network-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: legacy-network-app
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      hostNetwork: false
      containers:
      - name: legacy-app
        image: legacy-network-app:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 7000
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: legacy-network-app
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: legacy-network-app
  ports:
  - port: 7000
    targetPort: 7000
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: realtime-trading-engine
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: realtime-trading-engine
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: realtime-trading-engine
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: realtime-trading-engine
        tier: critical
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - weight: 100
            podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchLabels:
                  app: realtime-trading-engine
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
      containers:
      - name: trading-engine
        image: realtime-trading-engine:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8888
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: LATENCY_MODE
          value: "ultra-low"
        - name: BYPASS_PROXY
          value: "true"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
          limits:
            memory: "2Gi"
            cpu: "2000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: realtime-trading-engine
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: realtime-trading-engine
  ports:
  - port: 8888
    targetPort: 8888
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: metrics-collector
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics-collector
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: metrics-collector
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: collector
        image: metrics-collector:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9091
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 9092
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: COLLECTION_INTERVAL
          value: "1s"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: metrics-collector
  ports:
  - name: metrics
    port: 9091
    targetPort: 9091
    protocol: TCP
  - name: admin
    port: 9092
    targetPort: 9092
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
